title: Locals should not be passed to a Django render function
description: Avoid passing locals directly to Django render functions, as it can lead to potential security issues.
message: Locals should not be passed directly to Django render functions
recommendation: Use context variables or pass only required variables
why_is_this_an_issue: Directly passing locals can lead to potential security issues such as Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
how_to_fix: Use context variables or pass only required variables

metadata.title: Locals should not be passed to a Django render function
